caption: A sequence of frames displays the evolution of a logo animation against a neutral gray and white background. A red circular emblem containing a stylized white number "13" and the vertical word "kanal" appears in the center. Initially, the logo is set against a solid gray background. As the sequence progresses, the background transitions to white, and the red fill of the circle disappears, leaving only a red outline. Below the emblem, the text "Kanal13AZ" fades into view. In the final stages, a small red YouTube-style button appears beneath the text, featuring a white play icon and the phrase "abuna ol". The final frame returns to a gray background while retaining the outlined logo, the text "Kanal13AZ", and the "abuna ol" subscription button.
